question: Based on the stacked area chart of quarterly store operations indicators, which statement about overall store performance is most appropriate?

options.A: The chart cannot determine overall performance because it stacks unrelated metrics with different units.
options.B: Q1 shows the best overall performance because it has the highest total stacked area.
options.C: Q2 shows the best overall performance because its indicators are most balanced.
options.D: Q4 shows the best overall performance because it has the lowest energy usage segment.

explanation: The chart stacks unrelated metrics (Revenue, Energy Usage, etc.) into a cumulative area. These metrics have different units and meanings, so adding them together creates a meaningless total. The stacked area cannot be used to assess overall performance. Only individual metric analysis is valid.
